scripts.heroku-postbuild: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION=false npm install && npm run build
scripts.pm2:dev: pm2 start ecosystem.config.js --only krystallise-backend-dev && cd frontend && VITE_ENABLE_LOGS=debug VITE_LOG_LEVEL=info npm run build && pm2 logs
scripts.pm2:dev:watch: nodemon --watch . --ignore frontend/node_modules --ignore backend/node_modules --ignore frontend/dist --ext js,ts,tsx,jsx,json --exec "npm run pm2:dev"
